items.title: My top 5 takeaways from @alexalbert__ on how Anthropic is building the next Claude model:…

items.description: My top 5 takeaways from @alexalbert__ on how Anthropic is building the next Claude model: 1. Think about the model and harness together The model and the harness are coupled. Each surface wraps the model in a different prompt and tool setu…
items.description_zh: 我从 @alexalbert__ 得到的关于 Anthropic 如何构建下一个 Claude 模型的 5 个重要要点： 1. 一起思考模型和线束 模型和线束是耦合的。每个表面都以不同的提示和工具设置包裹模型……

items.title: We had an unbelievable tech team and talent overall.
items.title_zh: 我们拥有一支令人难以置信的技术团队和人才。
items.description: We had an unbelievable tech team and talent overall. Many of them went onto awesome careers. Founders of Coderpad, Modern Treasury, Maude, amongst others EPD at Airbnb, Stripe, Apple, Oscar, Google, I’m sure I am missing some. Many were fi…
items.description_zh: 我们拥有一支令人难以置信的技术团队和人才。他们中的许多人都走上了辉煌的职业生涯。 Coderpad、Modern Treasury、Maude 以及 Airbnb、Stripe、Apple、Oscar、Google 的 EPD 创始人，我确信我错过了一些。许多人都…

items.title: Something else that's fairly underrated is that the entire middle category got obliterate…
items.title_zh: 另一件被相当低估的事情是整个中间类别被抹去了……
items.description: Something else that's fairly underrated is that the entire middle category got obliterated during covid You're either wearing basics bordering on pajamas to bum around at home or flashy high-end stuff to flex on Instagram. No one was reall…
items.description_zh: 另一件被相当低估的事情是，整个中间类别在新冠疫情期间被消灭了。你要么穿着基本款睡衣在家里闲逛，要么穿着华丽的高端衣服在 Instagram 上展示。没有人是真正的……

items.title: I haven’t worked at Everlane in almost 10 years but it’s a pretty sad day for the people…
items.title_zh: 我已经快 10 年没有在 Everlane 工作了，但这对人们来说是非常悲伤的一天……
items.description: I haven’t worked at Everlane in almost 10 years but it’s a pretty sad day for the people that built it. Ultimately, the thing that did it in was the pandemic — Everlane was mainly wear-to-work and that market basically disappeared overnigh…
items.description_zh: 我已经快 10 年没有在 Everlane 工作了，但这对于建造它的人来说是非常悲伤的一天。最终，造成这种情况的是大流行——Everlane 主要是工作服，而这个市场基本上在一夜之间就消失了……

items.description: okay this is going kinda viral and tbh my original text was kind of messy, so here's a second pass with the help of Claude: -- Implement <SPEC>. As you work maintain a running implementation-notes.html file that captures anything I should…

items.title: as much as you spec there are always still ambiguities and unknown unknowns that come up…
items.title_zh: 正如您所指定的那样，总会出现歧义和未知的未知情况……
items.description: as much as you spec there are always still ambiguities and unknown unknowns that come up and this gives the model a good out to make decisions but keep you in the loop
items.description_zh: 正如您所指定的那样，总会出现歧义和未知的未知情况，这为模型提供了很好的决策空间，但让您随时了解情况

items.title: All Firewall mitigations are now fully free on @vercel.
items.title_zh: 所有防火墙缓解措施现在在 @vercel 上完全免费。
items.description: All Firewall mitigations are now fully free on @vercel. Not just DDoS and system-level mitigations, but also any rule you configure. Vercel now absorbs the computational and network costs of any size of attack or traffic mitigation for you…
items.description_zh: 所有防火墙缓解措施现在在 @vercel 上完全免费。不仅是 DDoS 和系统级缓解措施，还包括您配置的任何规则。 Vercel 现在可以为您吸收任何规模的攻击或流量缓解的计算和网络成本……

items.title: A 𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚊𝚕𝚕 your agents will love.
items.title_zh: 您的代理商一定会喜欢的𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚊𝚕𝚕。
items.description: A 𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚊𝚕𝚕 your agents will love. One of the coolest things about Vercel’s Firewall is how hard the team worked on instant global propagation (~300ms). Imagine if 𝚒𝚙𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎𝚜 took *minutes* to propagate? That’s the average ind…
items.description_zh: 您的代理商一定会喜欢的𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚊𝚕𝚕。 Vercel 防火墙最酷的事情之一是团队在即时全球传播（约 300 毫秒）方面的努力。想象一下如果𝚒𝚙𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎𝚜花了*分钟*来传播？这是平均行业…

items.title: This is true of all agents, not just coding agents.
items.title_zh: 所有代理都是如此，而不仅仅是编码代理。
items.description: This is true of all agents, not just coding agents. Probably the biggest challenge that most companies run into in their agent strategy is getting agents the right constrained context to work with for a task. Too much information or confli…
items.description_zh: 所有代理都是如此，而不仅仅是编码代理。大多数公司在代理策略中遇到的最大挑战可能是为代理提供正确的受限环境来完成任务。信息过多或冲突...
